CVE-2018-10773.title: NULL pointer deference in the addsn function in serialno.c in lib ...
CVE-2018-10773.description: NULL pointer deference in the addsn function in serialno.c in libbibcore.a in bibutils through 6.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash), as demonstrated by copac2xml.

CVE-2018-10774.title: Read access violation in the isiin_keyword function in isiin.c in ...
CVE-2018-10774.description: Read access violation in the isiin_keyword function in isiin.c in libbibutils.a in bibutils through 6.2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash), as demonstrated by isi2xml.
